---
title: "Hypothesis Testing"
sidebar: false
toc: false
---

[← All courses](../teaching.qmd){.back-link}

::: {.page-intro}
An introduction to statistical hypothesis testing for **M1 ENSAI** students: testing models,
classical tests on Gaussian populations, goodness-of-fit and homogeneity, tests for dependency,
and multiple testing. See the [Glossary](../glossary.qmd) for English/French translations and
the note on [Density and Likelihood](../probability/density_likelihood.qmd) for background.
:::

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Slides (Fr)

::: {.resource-grid}
[Testing Models](slides/testing_models_fr.qmd){.resource-chip}
[Usual Distributions](slides/usual_distributions_fr.qmd){.resource-chip}
[Classical Tests on Gaussian Populations](slides/gaussian_populations_fr.qmd){.resource-chip}
[Goodness of Fit and Homogeneity](slides/goodness_of_fit_chi2_fr.qmd){.resource-chip}
[Tests for Dependency](slides/dependency_fr.qmd){.resource-chip}
[Multiple Testing and Detection Rates](slides/multiple_minimax_fr.qmd){.resource-chip}
:::

## Slides (En)

::: {.resource-grid}
[Testing Models](slides/testing_models.qmd){.resource-chip}
[Usual Distributions](slides/usual_distributions.qmd){.resource-chip}
[Classical Tests on Gaussian Populations](slides/gaussian_populations.qmd){.resource-chip}
[Goodness of Fit and Homogeneity](slides/goodness_of_fit_chi2.qmd){.resource-chip}
[Tests for Dependency](slides/dependency.qmd){.resource-chip}
:::

## Lecture Notes (HTML)

::: {.resource-grid}
[Testing Models](lectures/testing_models.qmd){.resource-chip}
[Classical Tests on Gaussian Populations](lectures/gaussian_populations.qmd){.resource-chip}
[Goodness of Fit and Homogeneity](lectures/goodness_of_fit_chi2.qmd){.resource-chip}
[Tests for Dependency](lectures/dependency.qmd){.resource-chip}
:::

## Exercises (Fr)

::: {.resource-grid}
[TD1](TDs/TD1_fr.qmd){.resource-chip}
[TD2](TDs/TD2_fr.qmd){.resource-chip}
[TD3](TDs/TD3_fr.qmd){.resource-chip}
[TD4](TDs/TD4_fr.qmd){.resource-chip}
[TD5 — exercices supplémentaires (en cours, hors TD)](TDs/TD5_fr.qmd){.resource-chip}
[TP](TDs/TP_fr.qmd){.resource-chip}
:::

## Exercises (En)

::: {.resource-grid}
[TD1](TDs/TD1.qmd){.resource-chip}
[TD2](TDs/TD2.qmd){.resource-chip}
[TD3](TDs/TD3.qmd){.resource-chip}
[TD4](TDs/TD4.qmd){.resource-chip}
[TP](TDs/TP.qmd){.resource-chip}
:::

## Annals

::: {.resource-grid}
[Exam 2025](annals/test_2025.qmd){.resource-chip}
[Correction 2025](annals/correction_2025.qmd){.resource-chip}
[Exam 2026 (PDF)](annals/test_2026.pdf){.resource-chip}
[Correction 2026 (PDF)](annals/correction_2026.pdf){.resource-chip}
:::

## Pluto Notebooks

::: {.resource-grid}
[Proba Basics](pluto/proba_basics.html){.resource-chip}
[Approximation of Distributions](pluto/distribution_comparisons.html){.resource-chip}
[Illustration of p-value](pluto/illustration_pvalue.html){.resource-chip}
:::

:::
